description: Enjoy every step you take and every ace you make with this adidas tennis sneaker. This shoe has a flexible design that allows the muscles to adapt to your stride accordingly. With quality and comfort rolled into one, there's no better way to win a game in style than with the adidas Makis. Team it with tennis shorts and performance t-shirts for that fresh feel, or simply apir it with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic upper with extensive stitch detailing for lightweight comfort and durabilityPerforations on the toe box, sides and the heel cup for maximum ventilationMesh tongue with textile lining for enhanced breathabilityGilly central lacing for snug FitMesh collar with textile lining for maximum comfortBrand mark on synthetic patch on the tongueToe box made of abrasion resistant adiTUFF for exceptional durability even during toe dragMidsoleInjected EVA for long term lightweight cushioning  3D torsion bar system for midfoot stability Soft, cushy footbed for ergonomic fit and all-day comfortOutsoleNon-marking rubber with high quality durability in high wear areasOutsole with a pivot point on the big toe mound, and alternating waffle and herringbone pattern for greater traction and gripScooped out mid arch with exposed metal mesh panel for greater breathability  and to reduce impactShoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
